overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked, foggy futuristic metropolis. The vehicle navigates neon-lit highways, stops at traffic signals, traverses narrow urban canyons, and finally enters an indoor parking garage. The scene features prominent corporate towers with bright holographic advertisements and wet streets reflecting cyan and red neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway approaching neon-lit corporate district

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on a multi-lane highway toward a towering corporate building with bright neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling in the same lane ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large illuminated red and blue neon billboards near the top
elevated concrete highway structure with support pillars
tall pole with dual horizontal LED light fixtures
futuristic skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night highway with the camera vehicle driving toward a massive corporate tower covered in bright neon advertisements. The road is multi-lane asphalt with highway overpasses visible to the right, and distant illuminated towers piercing through the haze on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with traffic control and billboards

events.description: vehicle comes to a stop at a red traffic light at the highway intersection
traffic light changes from red to green allowing the vehicle to proceed through the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving on the highway, stopping at a red traffic light, then proceeding through the intersection on green

notable_agents.action: opposing traffic vehicle waiting at the red light in the opposite lane

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal pole with red and green lights visible
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
dark mountain outline visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving and approaches a traffic-controlled intersection, stopping at a red light. While waiting, opposing traffic is visible to the left, and a large billboard stands in the center distance. The neon corporate tower recedes to the left background as the light turns green and the vehicle proceeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon between high-rise buildings with underpasses

events.description: transition from open highway to narrow enclosed street between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight urban streets and alleys with tall buildings flanking both sides

entered.detail: tall dark office building with illuminated windows forming a canyon wall
high-rise structure with fire escapes and neon accents on the facade
concrete overpass structure crossing above the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides, creating a claustrophobic corridor. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting from street lamps and building windows. The neon corporate tower remains visible in the distance straight ahead as the vehicle passes under concrete underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road leading to indoor parking structure

events.description: vehicle enters indoor parking garage from the outdoor industrial area

agents.ego_description: driving through an industrial area with concrete walls and entering an enclosed parking garage

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete wall with weathered surface and red markings
industrial metal framework structure attached to the concrete wall
spray-painted text reading CORPORATE THIEVES MUST DIE on the concrete wall
large opening leading into an indoor parking structure with overhead clearance
concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and ventilation ducts inside the garage
long overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the garage interior

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions through an industrial zone with large concrete pillars and anti-corporate graffiti on the walls. The vehicle approaches and enters an indoor parking garage, moving from the foggy outdoor environment into a fluorescently lit concrete interior with visible ceiling infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a foggy, neon-lit metropolis that transitions from an open highway into a claustrophobic industrial interior. It begins on a multi-lane asphalt highway, moving toward a massive corporate tower draped in bright advertisements while distant illuminated spires pierce the haze. As the vehicle approaches a traffic-controlled intersection and pauses at a red light, the corporate tower recedes into the background before the camera proceeds into a narrow urban canyon of towering buildings and wet, reflective asphalt. The scene then shifts through an industrial zone marked by concrete pillars and anti-corporate graffiti, passing under heavy underpasses as the environment tightens. Finally, the camera moves from the foggy outdoor night into the fluorescently lit concrete interior of an indoor parking garage.
